title: Duolingo Design (Brand Guidelines hub)
summary: Public brand bible SPA covering identity, writing, illustration, marketing assets. Excellent for personality→production systems; not a product component library. Content contains historical product fossils — revalidate product facts.
lessons: Personality must propagate across words, shapes, imagery, and production constraints.
Document with principle → rule → good/bad → production limit → related links.
Character systems need anatomy, emotion limits, and verbal contracts.
caveats: Stale product terminology and stats may appear; treat as case study not current product truth.
No public a11y/motion/component engineering system on this site.
licenseNote: Public brand guidelines; cite and synthesize only.
antiImitationNote: Never copy Duo, green owl geometry, feather type, or proprietary assets. Transfer process only.
